Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mild hyperchloremia. Liver enzymes (ALT) are slightly elevated, possibly indicating mild hepatic involvement. Lipid profile reveals increased triglycerides and LDL cholesterol, raising cardiovascular risk. Globulin is low, which may reflect nutritional or immunological issues. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and further evaluation of renal, hepatic, and cardiovascular status.
